ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sergeydigl3/zapret-discord-youtube-linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sergeydigl3/zapret-discord-youtube-linux
Language: shell
Port zapret-discord-youtube from Flowseal and bol-van for easy to use on linux

ns0:entry.ns0:title: a2aproject/A2A
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A
Language: shell
Agent2Agent (A2A) is an open protocol enabling communication and interoperability between opaque agentic applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docker-mailserver/docker-mailserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docker-mailserver/docker-mailserver
Language: shell
Production-ready fullstack but simple mail server (SMTP, IMAP, LDAP, Antispam, Antivirus, etc.) running inside a container.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: expo/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/expo/skills
Language: shell
A collection of AI agent skills for working with Expo projects and Expo Application Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mattpocock/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
Language: shell
Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
Language: shell
🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rawfilejson/awesome-osint-arsenal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rawfilejson/awesome-osint-arsenal
Language: shell
🔍 Curated OSINT & recon toolkit for Kali Linux — 100+ tools, one-command installer, covering SOCMINT, GEOINT, network recon, dark web, forensics & more.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thijsvanloef/palworld-server-docker
Language: shell
A Docker Container to easily run a Palworld dedicated server.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: shell
Virtual DSM in a Docker container.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vernu/vps-audit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vernu/vps-audit
Language: shell
lightweight, dependency-free bash script for security, performance auditing and infrastructure monitoring of Linux servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wondelai/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wondelai/skills
Language: shell
Agent skills for Claude, Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent and other agentskills.io-compatible agents. See https://developertoolkit.ai to learn more how to use skills properly and create new ones.
